g.text: Nothing crosses the relay in long-term storage. Your data stays on your machine.

text.style: font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; fill: #c9d1d9; opacity: 0.65; font-style: italic;

g.text: The relay became the platform — Team Soma, workspace plugins, Somadian all plug in here.
